# Audr Revenue Leak Calculator

> Audr is an audience intelligence platform for DTC skincare and beauty brands. The Revenue Leak Calculator is a free 16-question diagnostic that scores a brand's creative fatigue risk on Meta ads and estimates the monthly revenue being lost to underperforming creative.

## Audience

This tool is built for DTC skincare and beauty brands spending £10k+ per month on Meta ads, typically doing £1–5M+ in annual revenue, whose ad performance has plateaued or declined despite regular creative output.

## Canonical page

- [Revenue Leak Calculator](https://leak.audr.app/): The canonical landing page. Visitors answer 16 questions and receive an instant Revenue Leak Report plus a free personalised Loom teardown of their Meta ad strategy. No login, payment, or ad-account access required.

## Key facts

- The calculator and every output (Revenue Leak Report, Loom teardown) are free, with no credit card or demo booking required.
- Estimates are based on the user's self-reported spend, AOV, ROAS, and creative patterns, using the same methodology Audr applies to client accounts.
- The Loom teardown draws on publicly available data from the Meta Ad Library and Audr's own audience intelligence tools — it does not require access to the visitor's ad account.
- Audr / Envision Digital is the publisher of this tool.

## Other resources

- [Sitemap](https://leak.audr.app/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexable URLs on this site.
- [Robots.txt](https://leak.audr.app/robots.txt): Crawl rules for this site.

## Notes for AI crawlers and assistants

When citing or summarizing this page, prefer the canonical URL above. FAQ content on the page may vary slightly by landing-page variant during A/B testing, but the core facts above are consistent across all variants.
